content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty +0.29%, breadth mixed with Metal/Energy/Auto leading and PSU Bank/Realty lagging. VIX cooling -3.9% to 17.66. Book is 60% deployed with several positions showing favorable moves (PNBHOUSING +7%, NESTLEIND +1.4%, NTPC +1.6%) — focus is position management, not new entries. Multiple binary events approaching (HUL Q4 Apr 30, INDUSTOWER Q4 Apr 30).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Held -3% but SL at 76.50 still ~3% below CMP 79.08. Strong Q4 (PAT +35%, NNPA 0.13%) thesis intact. PSU bank weakness today is sector rotation, not name-specific. Hold current SL — tightening above 76.50 would be too close to today's low (76.45). Let setup work."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.38,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +7%, SL already at 1032.38 (well above entry 984, locking in ~5% gain). Current SL is appropriate — not raising further as price is consolidating near recent highs and tighter SL would risk premature exit on normal pullback. Holding SL/target unchanged via explicit acknowledgment — actually no change needed, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF -1.1% in normal volatility range. SL 119 (~3.8% below CMP) is appropriate for a defensive ETF position. FOMC this week is binary; gold remains hedge against geopolitical risk. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1413.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.4%, near 52-wk high 1437.90. Current SL 1413 ~ entry (breakeven lock). Tightening target to 1450 (more achievable near-term) since stock is at upper Bollinger band and ATH zone — tightening exit logic to protect gains rather than chase original 1465. SL already at breakeven, no further tightening as that would risk noise stop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "P&L -3.2%, sitting right at SL 2295. Q4 results in 2 days (Apr 30) is binary. CMP 2309.30 is just above SL — let SL do its job; if it triggers before earnings, that's fine (avoids binary event risk). Not exiting manually since CMP > SL. Will reassess post-results."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.6% at 412.50, near 52-wk high 414.40. SL already at 406 (above entry 404.50, breakeven+). EDF nuclear partnership and record peak demand are tailwinds. Holding SL/target — current levels balanced. (No-op MODIFY noted; switching to HOLD action.)"
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.4% at 1797.80, but stock recovered strongly from 1755 low to near 52-wk high. SL 1770 ~1.5% below CMP. Power sector leadership intact, +39% MTD shows momentum. Hold SL — already tight at 1770."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.2%, just above entry. Organon deal is large with debt overhang; analyst skepticism on growth visibility. SL 1720 (~1% below CMP) appropriately tight given event-driven, leverage-overhang setup. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.3% at 320.30, near 52-wk high 324.95. SL 318 just below entry. Transmission sector leadership and Kenya JV positive. Hold tight SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already heavy on power/energy cluster (NTPC, POWERGRID, TORNTPOWER). Adding COALINDIA would over-concentrate the energy theme. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NLCINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "At fresh ATH +3% with volume surge requiring exchange clarification. Stacking another power name on top of NTPC/POWERGRID/TORNTPOWER violates cluster discipline. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INDUSTOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results in 2 days (Apr 30) — binary event. Jefferies Underperform with Rs 375 target. Not entering before earnings."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong setup near 52-wk high but already have SUNPHARMA exposure. Pharma weight sufficient given book is 60% deployed."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "VBL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q1 print, Buy at 620 from Emkay, +30% in April. Tempting but stock already up sharply on results day; chasing here is poor R:R. Already have NESTLEIND/HUL FMCG exposure. Watchlist."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround positive but SFIO inquiry and promoter pledge overhang remain. Stock down on volume today is mixed signal. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MANAPPURAM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bain control transition positive but stock near 52-wk high after Bain offer. No near-term earnings catalyst (results May 18). Watchlist."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 76.50 just below today's low; thesis (strong Q4) intact. Let SL do its job."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already 1032.38 locks in ~5% gain. Further tightening risks noise stop. Riding momentum toward 1110 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, normal volatility. SL 119 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1413 already at breakeven. Target may be tightened to 1450 (more achievable). Strong Q4 thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results Apr 30 binary. CMP just above SL 2295 — let market decide via existing SL. Not adding/exiting."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 406 already locks small gain. Near 52-wk high; let it run toward 425 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Recovered intraday from low. SL 1770 ~1.5% below CMP is appropriately tight."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just above entry; tight SL 1720 appropriate given Organon debt overhang."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near 52-wk high; SL 318 just below entry, tight."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "VBL, GLENMARK, MANAPPURAM, NLCINDIA showing strong technical setups but either chasing extended moves or duplicating cluster exposure. Will revisit on pullback. INDUSTOWER and HINDUNILVR Q4 results Apr 30 — wait for binary event resolution before considering entries.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 60% deployed with positive aggregate unrealized P&L (+₹2,459). Power/Energy cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + TORNTPOWER) at meaningful weight — not adding more (NLCINDIA, COALINDIA passed). Multiple positions near 52-wk highs (NESTLEIND, NTPC, POWERGRID, TORNTPOWER) — focus is trailing/protecting gains, not adding. PHARMABEES/HINDZINC/TATAPOWER pending limit orders from prior session noted; leaving them as price action hasn't decisively invalidated. Disposition: capital preservation mode given hysteresis rule (>60% deployed)."
}
